title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Biocon Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Biocon Digital Technologies:
Biocon Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
